sentences.arabic: فِي عَصْرٍ يَتَّسِمُ بِالتَّسَارُعِ التِّكْنُولُوجِيِّ الْهَائِلِ، أَصْبَحَ التَّعَلُّمُ مَدَى الْحَيَاةِ ضَرُورَةً قُصْوَى لِلْبَقَاءِ فِي السُّوقِ الْمِهَنِيِّ.
sentences.translation: U eri koju karakteriše ogromno tehnološko ubrzanje, cjeloživotno učenje postalo je krajnja neophodnost za opstanak na profesionalnom tržištu.
sentences.translationEn: In an era characterized by rapid technological acceleration, lifelong learning has become an absolute necessity for professional survival.

sentences.arabic: فَلَمْ يَعُدْ كَافِيًا الِاعْتِمَادُ فَقَطْ عَلَى الشَّهَادَةِ الْجَامِعِيَّةِ الَّتِي حَصَلَ عَلَيْهَا الْمَرْءُ قَبْلَ عُقُودٍ، بَلْ يَسْتَلْزِمُ الْأَمْرُ اكْتِسَابًا مُسْتَمِرًّا لِلْمَهَارَاتِ.
sentences.translation: Više nije dovoljno oslanjati se samo na univerzitetsku diplomu koju je osoba stekla prije nekoliko decenija, već situacija zahtijeva kontinuirano sticanje vještina.
sentences.translationEn: It is no longer sufficient to rely solely on a university degree obtained decades ago; rather, continuous skill acquisition is required.

sentences.arabic: وَتُولِي الْمُؤَسَّسَاتُ الْآنَ أَوْلَوِيَّةً لِلْمُرَشَّحِينَ الَّذِينَ يُبْدُونَ عَقْلِيَّةَ نُمُوٍّ وَاسْتِعْدَادًا لِلتَّكَيُّفِ مَعَ الْأَدَوَاتِ الرَّقْمِيَّةِ النَّاشِئَةِ.
sentences.translation: Institucije sada daju prioritet kandidatima koji pokazuju mentalitet rasta i spremnost da se prilagode novonastalim digitalnim alatima.
sentences.translationEn: Organizations now prioritize candidates who exhibit a growth mindset and a willingness to adapt to emerging digital tools.

sentences.arabic: وَبِنَاءً عَلَى ذَلِكَ، دَمَجَتْ مَعَاهِدُ كَثِيرَةٌ دَوْرَاتٍ مَرِنَةً عَبْرَ الْإِنْتَرْنِتِ ضِمْنَ بَرَامِجِ التَّطْوِيرِ الْوَظِيفِيِّ لِتَسْهِيلِ نُمُوِّ الْمُوَظَّفِينَ.
sentences.translation: Shodno tome, mnogi instituti su integrisali fleksibilne online kurseve u programe profesionalnog razvoja kako bi olakšali napredak zaposlenih.
sentences.translationEn: Consequently, many institutions have integrated flexible online courses into their professional development programs to facilitate employee growth.

sentences.arabic: فَإِذَا أَهْمَلَ الْفَرْدُ السَّعْيَ وَرَاءَ الْمَعَارِفِ الْمُحَدَّثَةِ، فَإِنَّهُ يُخَاطِرُ بِالتَّخَلُّفِ عَنِ الرَّكْبِ فِي سُوقٍ عَالَمِيَّةٍ شَدِيدَةِ التَّنَافُسِ.
sentences.translation: Ako pojedinac zanemari potragu za ažuriranim znanjem, rizikuje da zaostane na visoko konkurentnom globalnom tržištu.
sentences.translationEn: If an individual neglects the pursuit of updated knowledge, they risk becoming obsolete in a highly competitive global market.

sentences.arabic: وَخِتَامًا، فَإِنَّ رِحْلَةَ التَّعْلِيمِ مَسَارٌ مُتَوَاصِلٌ لَا يَنْتَهِي بِمَرَاسِمِ التَّخَرُّجِ، بَلْ يَمْتَدُّ لِيَشْمَلَ حَيَاةَ الْإِنْسَانِ بِأَكْمَلِهَا.
sentences.translation: Zaključno, put obrazovanja je kontinuirana staza koja se ne završava ceremonijom diplomiranja, već se proteže kroz cijeli ljudski život.
sentences.translationEn: Ultimately, the journey of education is a continuous path that does not end with a graduation ceremony, but extends throughout one's entire life.
